esqlQuery.esql:
FROM metrics-prometheusreceiver.otel-*
// L0 sublevels > 20 typically triggers write stalls; early warning
// Adjust threshold (20) if your workload differs
| WHERE metrics.storage_l0_sublevels IS NOT NULL AND metrics.storage_l0_sublevels > 20
| STATS l0_sublevels = MAX(metrics.storage_l0_sublevels)
  BY resource.attributes.service.instance.id, attributes.node_id, attributes.store
| SORT l0_sublevels DESC
